name: Download Image from URL
body: [{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the download image from URL add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Product Management section, find the Download Image from URL add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A "}, {"text": "Download Image from URL", "bold": true}, {"text": " button will appear in the "}, {"text": "Images", "bold": true}, {"text": " section of each product in the control panel:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: ]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Download Image from URL", "bold": true}, {"text": "\u00a0button, the field will appear on the right."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the full web address of the image. Click on the arrow to the right of the field and select the "}, {"text": "Force Check", "bold": true}, {"text": " checkbox. Then click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A process runs once an hour (however this can be changed) to download the image to a folder on your site. A second process runs every 15 minutes (the schedule can be changed) which creates the three sizes of the image that is displayed on your website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Force Check", "bold": true}, {"text": " will download and process the image from the entered web address next time the processes are run."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also set to check download the image from the web address on a regular basis by entering the number of days in "}, {"text": "Image Download Check Interval", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Set to zero if you don't need periodic checking."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Tips for Downloading Images"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make sure the image web address is valid."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make sure that the image can be accessed. Some web servers block other sites accessing the images."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The image can be in JPEG, PNG or GIF formats. It is recommended that you use JPEG as this format has smaller file sizes."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make sure there is no question mark in the image web address."}]}]}]}]
